title: Use Hostname settings, avoid mounting tmpfs over volumes with mounts
body: Go ahead and default to a hostname from the source image if it included one, and avoid mounting a tmpfs at a volume location if the list of mounts already includes an entry that mounts something else there.

comments.body: Okay, the logic that sets the list of mounts in the runtime spec is now its own function.
